_schema_note: 评测集模板。每条 entry 一个 Q&A。Step 4 评测时会用这个跑 retrieval recall + answer accuracy。

_fields.question: 问题（中/英都行）
_fields.expected_answer: 标准答案（事实性、可对比）
_fields.source_papers: 答案来源论文的 stem（与 chunks.jsonl 中 source 字段对应），用于评估 retrieval 是否召回了正确论文
_fields.answer_type: factoid（事实型，如数字/名称）| reasoning（需要综合）| comparative（跨论文对比）
_fields.tags: 可选标签，如 dataset / sota / architecture / benchmark

entries.question: CBraMod is pretrained on how many BCI tasks and how many public datasets?
source_papers: Wang et al. - 2025 - CBraMod A Criss-Cross Brain Foundation Model for EEG Decoding

entries.question: BrainOmni pretraining 用了多少小时的 EEG 和 MEG 数据？
entries.expected_answer: 1997 hours of EEG and 656 hours of MEG
source_papers: Xiao et al. - 2025 - BrainOmni A Brain Foundation Model for Unified EEG and MEG Signals

entries.question: How does BrainWave perform on Alzheimer's disease (AD-65) compared to baselines?
entries.expected_answer: (填入具体 AUROC 数字和 baselines 名字)
source_papers: Yuan et al. - 2025 - BrainWave A Brain Signal Foundation Model for Clinical Applications

entries.question: What is the difference between CBraMod's criss-cross attention and full EEG modeling?
entries.expected_answer: Criss-cross uses two parallel attention mechanisms to model spatial and temporal dependencies separately; full EEG modeling models all dependencies together, ignoring their heterogeneity.
source_papers: Wang et al. - 2025 - CBraMod A Criss-Cross Brain Foundation Model for EEG Decoding

entries.question: Which brain foundation models support both EEG and MEG modalities?
entries.expected_answer: BrainOmni and Brain-OF (Brain-OF additionally supports fMRI).
source_papers: Xiao et al. - 2025 - BrainOmni A Brain Foundation Model for Unified EEG and MEG Signals
Brain-OF_ An Omnifunctional Foundation Model for fMRI, EEG and MEG
